title: Sakkarai Nilave Lyrics Youth
stanzas:
Sakkarai Nilave Song Lyrics From Youth
#ManiSharma #HarishRagavendra #Vairamuthu

Sakkarai Nilave pen nilave
kaanum podhe karaindhaye
nimmadhi illai
yaen illai
nee illaye... (2)

manam pachchai
thannithaan penne
adhai pattra
vaithadhun kannae

en vazhkai ennum
kaattai erithu
kulir kaaindhaai
kodumai penne

kavaidhai paadina kangal
kadhal pesina kaigal
kadaisiyil ellaam poigal
en pinju nenju thaangumaa.

Sarkkarai Nilave pen nilave
kaanum podhe karaindhaye
nimmadhi illai
yaen illai
nee illaye...

kadhal endra ondru
adhu kadavul pola
unarathaane mudiyum
adhil uruvam illai

kaayam kanda idhayam
oru kuzhandai pola
vaayai moodi azhume
solla vaarthai illai

anbae un punnagaiellaam
adi nenjil semithaen
kannae un punnagaiellaam
kanneeraai urugiyadhe

vellai sirippugal
un thavaraa
adhil kollai ponadhu
en thavaraa

pirindhu sendradhu
un thavara
adhai purindhu kondadhu
en thavara

aann kanneer parugum
pennin idhayam
sadhayalla kallin
suvaraa

kavaidhai paadina kangal
kadhal pesina kaigal
kadaisiyil ellaam poigal
en pinju nenju thaangumaa.

November maadha malai
naan nanaiven endren.
enakkum kooda nanaithal
miga pudikkum endraai

mottai maadi nilavil
naan kulippen endren
enakum kooda andha kuliyal
miga pudikkum endraai

sugamaana kural yaar endraal
Sushilaa-vin kural endren
enakkum andha kuralil yedho
mayakkam ena nee sonnaai.

kangal moodiya pudhar silai
en kanavil varuvadhu
pudikkum endren

thayakkam enbadhe
siridhum indri
adhu enakkum enakkum
thaan pudikkum endraai

adi unakkum unakkum
ellaam pudikka
ennai yaen
pudikkaadhendraai

kavaidhai paadina kangal
kadhal pesina kaigal
kadaisiyil ellaam poigal
en pinju nenju thaangumaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sakkarai Nilave?

The song Sakkarai Nilave expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the complexities of relationships.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Youth?

In Youth, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's feelings for his love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of Sakkarai Nilave?

The song is sung by Harish Ragavendra and composed by Mani Sharma.

When was Sakkarai Nilave released?

The song was released on July 19, 2002.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sakkarai Nilave, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions towards his beloved, encapsulating the essence of love and yearning. The song's soothing melody, composed by Mani Sharma, complements the poignant lyrics penned by Vairamuthu. It evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. The heartfelt rendition by Harish Ragavendra adds depth to the emotional landscape of the film Youth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sakkarai Nilave from Youth is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Harish Ragavendra's soulful vocals and Mani Sharma's enchanting composition, this song is a timeless classic. Dive into the lyrical depth crafted by Vairamuthu, making it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: When I see the sweet moon, it feels like there's no peace; why is it that you are not here?
My heart is like a green leaf, and it has captured your eyes.
My life is like a tree that has been cut down; it has become cold and painful.
The eyes that sing of love, in the end, will all fade away; will my tender heart be able to bear it?
When I see the sweet moon, it feels like there's no peace; why is it that you are not here?
Love is like a god; it can be felt, but it has no form.
A heart that has seen pain is like a child; it cannot speak words of beauty.
My dear, your smile has filled my heart; your smile has turned into tears.
Your white smiles are like a theft; they have stolen my heart.
What has separated us, I have understood; what has come together is also understood.
The tears of a man flow from a woman's heart; they are not just a wall of stones.
The eyes that sing of love, in the end, will all fade away; will my tender heart be able to bear it?
In November, I thought of the mountain; it would be nice to think of it together.
I said I would bathe in the moonlight; it would be nice to enjoy that together.
If someone asks who has a sweet voice, I would say it's Sushila's voice; you said that voice has some magic.
The eyes that are closed will bring a new statue into my dreams.
The feeling of love is sweet; it is something I also like.
Why do you not like me when everything is beautiful for you?
The eyes that sing of love, in the end, will all fade away; will my tender heart be able to bear it?
